description_long: This is a mid-century modern style armchair featuring a gently reclined, upholstered backrest and seat in a muted olive green fabric. The chair is supported by four angled wooden legs, each crafted from a warm-toned wood, giving it a sturdy yet elegant appearance. The armrests are broad, flat, and made of the same wood as the legs, providing both comfort and a striking visual contrast to the fabric. The seat and backrest are smoothly contoured, with no visible seams or patterns, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The overall design suggests comfort and durability, suitable for both relaxation and formal seating. Its proportions and materials make it ideal for use in waiting areas, lobbies, or stylish urban interiors.
description: A mid-century modern armchair with olive green upholstery, angled wooden legs, and broad wooden armrests. The design is minimalist, sturdy, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full seat, backrest, and both wooden armrests clearly.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the angled backrest and the wooden frame supporting the chair.
description_view_2: Back view emphasizing the solid, upholstered backrest and the symmetry of the wooden legs and armrests.
description_view_3: Front-side view displaying the seat, one armrest in detail, and the angled leg structure.
